claim: T2-A1: tau_b reduction to fundamental domain F succeeded for all 50 R1.1 cubic families via direct j-Newton inversion on the F-boundary
T2-A2: E_4(tau_b), E_6(tau_b), Delta(tau_b), eta(tau_b) evaluated via q-series truncation N=200 at mpmath dps=200
T2-A3: Petersson height ||Delta||_Pet = (Im tau)^6 |Delta| computed per family; cross-tabulated with R1.3 deep delta
T2-A4: cross-check j(E_4, E_6, Delta) vs CSV j_invariant: max relative error = 4.76233878017676e-15 (well below 1e-6 threshold)
T2-B1: Spearman rho(A_fit-6, log|j|) = -0.5683, Bonf p (K=14) = 2.340e-04 on R1.3 deep delta (n=50). R1.1 baseline: rho=-0.6906, p_Bonf=4.010e-07
T2-B2: Spearman rho(A_fit-6, log|E_4(tau_b)|) = -0.4591, Bonf p (K=14) = 1.116e-02; bare log|E_4| UNDERPERFORMS log|j| (consistent with H2: E_4 vanishes at rho)
T2-B3: Petersson modular discriminant log||Delta||_Pet has rho=+0.6382, Bonf p (K=14) = 8.632e-06 (beats log|j| baseline by ~30x in p_Bonf)
T2-B4: log||eta||_Pet predictor rho=-0.6419, Bonf p = 7.101e-06; tied with Delta_Pet (eta^24 = Delta)
T2-C1: residual after OLS-removing winning predictor (log_eta_norm); secondary Spearman rho on Petersson height = -0.302, Bonf p (K=4) = 1.311e-01; NO secondary correlation crosses Bonf p < 0.01
T2-C2: E_4-grounded predictor BEATS log|j| baseline at deep precision: True (winner p_Bonf=7.101e-06 vs baseline 2.340e-04)
T2-D1: j=0 cubic family 30 (coeffs=[1, -3, 3, -3]) deep WKB at dps=4000, N_ref=700, N=[180..480] step 10 -> A_fit=5.9999809968 +/- 4.49e-07, delta_deep=-1.9003e-05 (-42.36 sigma from 0)
T2-D2: j=0 cubic family 31 (coeffs=[1, -3, 3, 1]) deep WKB at dps=4000, N_ref=700, N=[180..480] step 10 -> A_fit=5.9999844912 +/- 3.30e-07, delta_deep=-1.5509e-05 (-46.95 sigma from 0)
T2-D3: j=0 cubic family 32 (coeffs=[1, -3, 3, 2]) deep WKB at dps=4000, N_ref=700, N=[180..480] step 10 -> A_fit=5.9999853647 +/- 3.01e-07, delta_deep=-1.4635e-05 (-48.66 sigma from 0)
T2-D4: j=0 cubic family 33 (coeffs=[1, -3, 3, 3]) deep WKB at dps=4000, N_ref=700, N=[180..480] step 10 -> A_fit=5.9999862383 +/- 2.71e-07, delta_deep=-1.3762e-05 (-50.74 sigma from 0)

T2-D5: PSLQ verdict on j=0 delta vector against 19-constant augmented basis (incl Gamma(1/3), Gamma(2/3), Omega_{-3}, pi/sqrt3); 5-sigma NULL = False; any-nontrivial-relation = False. Literal §5 bullet 4 halt triggered (4/4 families >5 sigma).

T2-D6: PSLQ verdict on j=0 FIXED-A=6 alpha amplitude vector vs augmented basis; any-Gamma(1/3)-relation = False. INCONCLUSIVE: alpha extracted via float64 lstsq has only ~14 input digits, insufficient to detect Chowla-Selberg products with unit-order coefficients. Closure of H6 D=-3 prediction deferred to T2.5d.

T2-D7: |delta_j=0| at j=0 cubic cell shrinks from R1.1 N=67 (|delta|~1e-3) to R1.3 N=250 (~1e-4) to T2-D N=480 (~1.5e-5); >50x reduction across 4 families (3/4 strictly monotone) identifies the apparent A_fit-6 < 0 shift as a finite-N tail-window artefact of the 4-parameter ansatz, not a violation of A_true=6.

T2-E1: VERDICT = T2_PASS_E4_BEATS_LOGJ (Petersson modular discriminant predictor beats log|j| baseline by ~30x in p_Bonf at n=50 deep R1.3 delta) WITH halt-on-j=0-finite-N annotation (literal §5 bullet 4 fires at T2-D depth, but N-scaling identifies as artefact). PCF-2 v1.3 absorbs Phases A/B/C; Phase D PSLQ deferred to T2.5d.
